[type]
Lexer

[grammar]
lexer grammar L;
I : ({print("stuff fail: " + self.text, file=self._output)} 'a'
| {print("stuff0:" + self.text, file=self._output)}
       'a' {print("stuff1: " + self.text, file=self._output)}
       'b' {print("stuff2: " + self.text, file=self._output)})
       {print(self.text, file=self._output)} ;
WS : (' '|'\n') -> skip ;
J : .;

[input]
ab

[output]
stuff0:
stuff1: a
stuff2: ab
ab
[@0,0:1='ab',<1>,1:0]
[@1,2:1='<EOF>',<-1>,1:2]
